name: craft-rhetoric
description: Rhetoric craft grounded in the five canons. Setup, discourse, cartography (magellan), planning, then per-deliverable: inventio (feynman), memoria (sagan), dispositio (vyasa), elocutio (orwell), actio (tufte/jobs), evaluate (socrates). Socrates gates between steps. Use when: writing docs, explaining concepts, research synthesis, creating tutorials, curating collections, making diagrams and cinematic animation, designing staged experiences, reviewing content for propagation and human authorship.
